name: core-layer-utility-relocation
description: When a src/core/ file imports from src/commands/, relocate the imported utility to src/core/ and re-export from the original commands/ module. Re-exports preserve the public import surface so external call sites and tests stay green; the utility becomes accessible to lower layers without inverting the dependency direction.

name: covered-set-via-toml-array
description: When syncing on-disk file existence (e.g. recipients/*.pub) with a logical 'has this been processed?' state, encode the latter as an explicit TOML array in a config file. The delta (files - array) yields a clean autodetect set without introspecting downstream artifacts. Used by ADR-0047 pair finalize: [age].recipients in .am-secrets.toml is the covered set; recipients/*.pub is the seen set; their delta is exactly 'needs finalize'.
